## Why It Works

This is a typical contrarian template. Take something that most people perceive as bad and then tell them why it's actually a good thing. Makes people think. Makes people comment.

## Template

Be happy you have [THING NORMALLY LOOKED AT AS BAD]
It's reserved for people [DOING AWESOME THING].
